title: "New API" (10-2023) support for activity log fields

posts.author: ram_perel (Ram Perel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
While researching the activity log API abilities I noticed that some things there are still in the “Old API” approache. For example the field_type is still multiple-people and color.
Is there a change to support that? I also feel that the activity log is a great tool but the API is a bit limited.
Thanks!

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Not to mention the activity log has delay sometimes, it makes it very hard to use with integrations since you need real time data - and activity log isn’t real time.

posts.author: Jmiller1 (Jack )
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Cody, I’m just running into an issue where I noticed certain activity log items aren’t showing up and a lot of them are from recent items. Do you know what the time delay is on them? Or have any resources that talk about they delay?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: I do not, I also don’t work for monday. I’m just commenting on my experience that it sometimes take a minute to show up. But if you’re experiencing something longer, then I don’t have answers and sounds like a bug (assuming you’re doing everything right)

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there!

@ram_perel there is no change on what you ask. I have shared this with our team so that they can take it into account.

@Jmiller1 please submit this form and our team will be happy to help!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Jmiller1 (Jack )
posts.cookedHtml:
What I’m doing is filling in status date mile stones before we started using a date column on the board to track them, so I use two pulls of data one of the tasks themselves and one from the activity logs. I had a break in activity log data and stumbled across @anon29275264’s comment which made me ask that question to him.

But realized the problem was created by me because I didn’t pull the same date range for the activity logs… so no issues besides me ha
